title: NWU Admission Requirements 2026 | North-West University APS
metaTitle: NWU Admission Requirements 2026 | APS by Faculty
metaDescription: North-West University 2026 admission requirements. APS 24–36 depending on programme. Engineering 30+, Law 30+, Education 24+. Full APS guide and application info.
content:
North-West University (NWU) Admission Requirements 2026

North-West University (NWU) is a multi-campus university with campuses in Potchefstroom, Mahikeng (Mafikeng), and the Vaal Triangle (Vanderbijlpark). NWU offers a wide range of programmes across multiple faculties. This guide covers the 2026 admission requirements by faculty, APS calculation, and the application process.

Use our free APS Calculator to instantly check if you qualify for NWU.

NWU Minimum APS Requirements by Faculty (2026)

Faculty / SchoolMinimum APSKey Subject Requirements
Engineering30Mathematics 5+, Physical Sciences 5+, English 4+
Law (LLB)30English 4+, any other 5 subjects
Health Sciences (Medicine, Pharmacy, Nursing)28–34Life Sciences 5+, Physical Sciences 4+, English 4+, Mathematics 4+
Natural Sciences (BSc)28Mathematics 4+, Physical Sciences or Life Sciences 4+, English 4+
Economic and Management Sciences (BCom)26Mathematics 4+, English 4+
Accounting Sciences26Mathematics 4+, Accounting 4+, English 4+
Education (BEd)24English 4+, subject specialisation requirements vary
Humanities (BA)24English 4+, any other five subjects
Theology24English 4+, any other five subjects

Note: APS requirements may differ slightly between NWU campuses. The Potchefstroom Campus (main campus) tends to have slightly higher admission requirements than the Mahikeng and Vaal campuses.

How NWU Calculates APS

NWU uses the standard NSC APS system:

  • Your APS is calculated from your six best NSC subjects
  • Life Orientation is counted at half value (maximum 2 APS points)
  • The highest possible APS including Life Orientation is 42
Percentage (%)APS Points
80–100%7
70–79%6
60–69%5
50–59%4
40–49%3
30–39%2
0–29%1

NWU Campuses and Their Character

CampusLocationCharacterKey Faculties
PotchefstroomPotchefstroom, North WestLargest campus, research-intensiveAll faculties, Law, Engineering, Health Sciences
MahikengMahikeng, North WestSmaller, community-orientedEducation, Commerce, Humanities, Theology
Vaal TriangleVanderbijlpark, GautengUrban, accessible from Joburg/VaalCommerce, ICT, Humanities, Law

NWU Law Admission Requirements 2026

NWU offers the LLB degree (Bachelor of Laws). Requirements:

  • APS: 30+ at Potchefstroom, 26+ at Mahikeng and Vaal Triangle
  • English: Level 4 (50%+)
  • Any five other subjects at Grade 12 pass level

NWU Application Process 2026

  1. Check your APS: Use our free APS Calculator to confirm eligibility
  2. Apply online: Visit www.nwu.ac.za and select your campus and programme
  3. Application fee: R180 (may vary by year)
  4. Required documents: Certified ID copy, Grade 11 or 12 results, proof of residence
  5. Application deadline: Typically end of September for the following year's intake

2026 Application Deadline for NWU

NWU applications for 2027 admission typically close in September 2026. For first-semester entry, the deadline is usually around September 30, 2026. Apply early — popular programmes at Potchefstroom fill up quickly.

NSFAS at NWU

NWU is a NSFAS-accredited institution. Students from households with income below R350,000 per year may qualify for NSFAS funding. Apply at www.nsfas.org.za from October each year.

Need to improve your APS for NWU? StudyBuddy's AI tutor helps Grade 10–12 students boost their marks in all CAPS subjects — start free today.
quickAnswer: NWU admission requirements 2026: Engineering needs APS 30+, Law 30+, Health Sciences 28–34+, Commerce 26+, Education 24+, and Humanities 24+. Life Orientation is counted at half value. Apply online at www.nwu.ac.za before September 30.

faqs.question: What is the minimum APS for NWU in 2026?
faqs.answer: NWU minimum APS ranges from 24 (Humanities, Education, Theology) to 34 (Medicine/Health Sciences). Most faculties require APS 26–30. The Potchefstroom campus generally has higher requirements than the Mahikeng and Vaal Triangle campuses.

faqs.question: What is the APS for Law at NWU?
faqs.answer: NWU Law (LLB) requires APS 30+ at the Potchefstroom campus and APS 26+ at the Mahikeng and Vaal Triangle campuses. You need English at Level 4 (50%+) and any five other Grade 12 subjects.

faqs.question: When do NWU applications close for 2026?
faqs.answer: NWU applications for 2027 admission typically close around September 30, 2026. Apply early as competitive programmes fill up quickly. Visit www.nwu.ac.za to apply online.

faqs.question: Does NWU count Life Orientation in APS?
faqs.answer: Yes, NWU counts Life Orientation at half value — a maximum of 2 APS points. Your main APS is calculated from your six best subjects (including LO at half value). This means the maximum APS including LO is 42.
